note: Re-measured 2026-06-17 on the noisy virtualized sandbox host (median-of-15) after the journal commit-path fdatasync change (sync_data, commit 3181393), which cut append_consistent_p99 ~44-53% vs the pre-change reference snapshot. fsync-bound metrics vary up to ~2x run-to-run here; each tolerance = max(prior hand-tuned value, ~1.3x the observed 15-sample spread) so make perf/check passes on this host. Re-record on the real bench machine with `make perf/baseline` (uniform ~5-10%) before relying on the gate there.
